metadata.title: EuroTracker — 2 Euro coin collection
metadata.description: Track your 2 euro coin collection. Browse all standard and commemorative 2 euro coins grouped by country.

landing.title: EuroTracker
landing.heroLine1: Track your 2 euro coin collection — standard designs and commemorative editions from all euro area countries.
landing.heroLine2: Over 500 coins to discover. Browse by country, toggle what you own, and watch your collection grow.
landing.featureAllCountriesText: Every euro area country plus Monaco, San Marino, Vatican City, and Andorra.
landing.featureManyCoinsText: Standard designs and hundreds of commemorative editions by year.
landing.featureOneClickText: Tap any coin to mark it as owned. Your collection syncs instantly.
landing.footer: EuroTracker — built with Next.js and Supabase

collection.title: My collection
collection.subtitle: Click any catalog coin to mark it as owned. Personal coins are only visible to you.
collection.progressHint: Total includes the full catalog ({catalogTotal} coins) plus your personal coins.
collection.personalCoinsNone: You have not added any personal coins.
collection.personalCoinsOne: You have added one personal coin.

auth.emailConfirmHint: This project still requires email confirmation. In Supabase: Authentication → Providers → Email → turn off "Confirm email" until you add a confirmation flow.

customCoinCard.deleteDialogDescription: “{name}” will be removed from your collection. This cannot be undone.

addCoin.dialogIntro: Only you can see this coin. Frame the coin in the circle (drag and zoom), then save — the photo is sent as a square JPEG and resized to WebP on the server. Uploads use your signed-in session (no service role key required).
addCoin.dialogIntroEdit: Update the details or replace the photo. To change the picture, drop a new file — it replaces the stored image at the same URL. Other fields save without a new photo.
addCoin.name: Name
addCoin.replaceHintExisting: Click or drop to replace the photo · JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF
addCoin.invalidImageType: Please use a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
addCoin.missingPhoto: Add a coin photo by clicking or dragging a file here.
addCoin.replaceHint: Click or drop to replace · JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF
addCoin.framingHint: Drag to center the coin inside the circle. Scroll or use the sliders to zoom and rotate.
addCoin.framingCanvasAria: Coin photo framing: drag to pan
addCoin.framingExportFailed: Could not prepare the framed photo. Try another image.
addCoin.notSignedInStorage: You must be signed in to upload images.
addCoin.webpNotSupported: This browser cannot export WebP from the preview. Try Chrome, Edge, or Firefox, or update your browser.
